source.title: NTAG 424 DNA and NTAG 424 DNA TagTamper features and hints

purpose: Implementation-oriented context for building an NTAG 424 DNA reader/writer and SUN/SDM verifier.
core_split: SUN/SDM verification of dynamic NDEF content
critical_gotchas: Do not mix SDM KDF and SSM KDF logic
Offsets and lengths in commands are commonly LSB-first
Mirrored SDM values are ASCII hex in the NDEF presentation layer
SDMMAC is computed over the dynamic ASCII view, not raw binary structures
NXP MAC truncation must match the app note exactly
Random ID and LRP enablement are irreversible
GetCardUID is required for real UID retrieval when Random ID is enabled
Failed-auth counters can cause apparent delays or blocking
provisioning_recipe: Change NDEF file settings to enable SDM
Authenticate with file-specific keys as needed
sun_verification_recipe: Reconstruct exact ASCII MAC input slice
Apply replay and product policy checks
